name: 🔒 Security Vulnerability Report
about: Report a security issue (NOT for public issues — see SECURITY.md)
title: "[security] (do not describe the vulnerability in the title)"
labels: ["security", "triage"]
assignees:
  - nassim0014
---

:warning: **Please do NOT file public security reports this way.**
Instead, follow the instructions in [SECURITY.md](../../security/policy)
and email **security@kinzoils.com** with the details.

If you've already emailed us and need to track the disclosure timeline,
you may use this template — but **redact** the technical details from
the public issue and reference the private thread.

## Disclosure timeline

- **Reported (email):** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Acknowledged:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Fix shipped:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Public advisory:** YYYY-MM-DD

## Affected versions

(Which versions are vulnerable? `git tag` or `pip show` output.)

## CVSS / severity

(Self-assessed. The maintainer will confirm.)

## Credits

(Reporter name/handle, or "anonymous".)
